name: Chivalry: Medieval Warfare
short_description: Besiege castles and raid villages in Chivalry: Medieval Warfare, a fast-paced medieval first person slasher with a focus on multiplayer battles
detailed_description:
CHECK OUT CHIVALRY 2


About the Game

AS OF APRIL 8, 2024, OFFICIAL SERVERS FOR CHIVALRY: MEDIEVAL WARFARE WILL BE SHUT DOWN.
Unofficial / private servers can be created by community members and may be available for public players to use. Offline play with AI is also available.

Besiege castles and raid villages in Chivalry: Medieval Warfare, a fast-paced medieval first person slasher with a focus on multiplayer battles. Featuring competitive online combat that seeks to capture the experience of truly being on a medieval battlefield. Inspired from the intensity and epicness of swordfighting movies such as 300, Gladiator and Braveheart, Chivalry: Medieval Warfare aims to bring that experience to the hands of a gamer.

The game is skill-based and controls like an FPS, but instead of guns and grenades, players are given swords, shields, maces, battleaxes and longbows. Set in a fictional, yet gritty and realistic world, players will fight in fast paced online battles besieging castles, raiding medieval villages and fighting for glory in the arena with up to 32 players.

Key Features:

  • Deep melee combat system provides players with a huge range of responsive combat options
  • Adjust your attacks and blocks in real time with the mouse for precise and full control of the action
  • Wield an arsenal of up to 60 brutal weapons ranging from broad swords and battle axes to longbows and javelins
  • Dynamic objective system brings team tactics and strategy to the forefront as players batter down gates, raid villages and assassinate enemy royalty to achieve victory.
  • Use a variety of siege weapons ranging from catapults, boiling oil, ballista, battering rams and more
  • Vast, lush environments that transport the player to a gritty and immersive medieval world.
  • Offline play options that allow players to gain familiarity with the controls and gameplay before being thrust into the action.

supported_languages:
English*, German, French, Italian, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Polish, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support

reviews.review_text:
I should've recommended this back in 2012. Check [url=https://steamdb.info/app/219640/charts/]SteamDB[/url], there are not many players left. 

Well, if your computer can't run Chivalry 2 or Mordhau, and you want to experience this type of gameplay, then it's worth considering on sale. The lowest recorded sale price is $2.49 at -90%.

How to play Chivalry: Medieval Warfare:

1. Select the Knight class.
2. Find the 'C' key on your keyboard. Glue it down.
3. Run toward the nearest group of people.
4. Swing your weapon horizontally into the back of your teammates' heads.
5. Watch as your own head is suddenly removed by a friendly catapult.
6. Type 'FOR AGATHAAAAA' in the chat while your screen turns grey.
7. Repeat until you develop a deep, personal hatred for archers.

I have spent hundreds of hours in this game and I still don't know which team I'm on because everyone is just the color 'Blood Red' after 30 seconds. It is the only game where you can lose an arm, get kicked off a bridge, and still feel like you won the argument because you screamed louder than the other guy. Best screaming simulator ever made.

Chivalry: Medieval Warfare is a first-person multiplayer medieval slasher where players fight using swords, axes, bows, and other weapons in chaotic battlefield matches. While the game was good when it released, it feels quite dated today. The graphics and animations haven’t aged well, and the player base is very small now. With the release of Chivalry 2, most players have moved on since it improves the graphics, gameplay, and overall polish. 5/10.
it's a nice game if you like with bots and only free for all. Teammission with bots is impossible and PVP is impossible to have fun with, too.
